title: Pamplona, Navarre — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pamplona, Navarre: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pamplona is a city in Navarre with a population of 202,000. Famous for the Running of the Bulls, with a beautiful old town, strong Basque-Navarrese culture, and excellent quality of life.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
